name: PickerResults
summary:
每个 PickerResult 对象

示例代码复制
//下面的代码显示选取器对话框，获取结果，然后枚举这些结果。
function test()
{
    // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
    let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
    objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
    objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
    let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
    let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
    let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
    let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
     
    // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
    let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
    
    // Enumerate the results.
    for(let index = 1; index <= objPickerResults.Count-1; index++){
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).Id)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).DisplayName)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).Type)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).SIPId)
    }
}

都代表一个解析的或选定的项目数据。

properties.name: Application
properties.description: 获取一个 Application 对象，该对象代表 PickerResults 对象的容器应用程序。只读

properties.name: Count
properties.description: 检索包含在 PickerResults 集合中的 PickerResult 对象数的计数。只读
properties.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码显示选取器对话框用户界面，获取结果，然后枚举这些结果。
function test()
{
    // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
    let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
    objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
    objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
    let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
    let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
    let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
    let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
     
    // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
    let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
    
    // Enumerate the results.
    for(let index = 1; index <= objPickerResults.Count-1; index++){
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).Id)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).DisplayName)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).Type)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).SIPId)
    }
}

properties.name: Creator
properties.description: 获取一个 32 位整数，该整数指示在其中创建了 PickerResults 对象的应用程序。只读

properties.name: Item
properties.description: 检索位于指定索引处的 PickerResult 对象。只读
properties.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码显示选取器对话框用户界面，获取结果，然后枚举这些结果。
function test()
{
    // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
    let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
    objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
    objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
    let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
    let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
    let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
    let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
     
    // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
    let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
    
    // Enumerate the results.
    for(let index = 1; index <= objPickerResults.Count-1; index++){
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).Id)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).DisplayName)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).Type)
        Debug.Print(objPickerResults.Item(index).SIPId)
    }
}

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: 指定一个代表 PickerResult 对象的索引位置的整数。

functions.name: Add
functions.description: 将 PickerResult 对象添加到 PickerResults 集合中。
functions.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码设置选取器对话框的属性，然后显示选取器对话框。
function test()
{
    // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
    let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
    objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
    objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
    let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
    let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
    let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
    let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
     
    // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
    let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
}

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: 代表 PickerResult 的标识符。

parameters.name: DisplayName
parameters.description: 代表 PickerResult 的显示名称。

parameters.name: SIPId
parameters.description: 当前不支持。SIPId 是 Office Communication Server 的标识符。它仅用于人员选取方案。

parameters.name: SubItems
parameters.description: 显示用于显示或不用于显示的 PickerResult 的域数据。它用于在选取器对话框中传递列值。
